title: Live results: Cornyn, Paxton, Hunt face off in Texas Senate GOP primary
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Sen. John Cornyn (R-Texas) is fighting for his political life in a heated GOP primary Tuesday. The incumbent, who has held on to his seat since 2002, is facing off with state Attorney General Ken Paxton and Rep. Wesley Hunt (R-Texas). President Trump has yet to endorse a candidate in the race. One candidate must…
